documentation: GS10 output frequency, raw Hz x100 (divide by 100 for Hz). Global vfd_frequency.
name: vfd_frequency

documentation: GS10 output current, raw A x100 (divide by 100 for A). Global vfd_current.
name: vfd_current

documentation: GS10 DC bus voltage, raw V x10 (divide by 10 for V; ~327 idle). Global vfd_dc_bus.
name: vfd_dc_bus

documentation: GS10 Modbus comm watchdog (true = PLC<->VFD link healthy; trust gate for the VFD values). Global vfd_comm_ok.
name: vfd_comm_ok

documentation: GS10 Status Monitor (0x2101) raw word. Decode: op_status=bits1-0 (0=Stopped,1=Decel,2=Standby,3=Operating), direction=bits4-3 (0=FWD,3=REV), bit8=FreqFromComms, bit10=RunFromComms. Global vfd_status_word.
name: vfd_status_word

documentation: GS10 active fault code (0x2100 low byte; 0=no fault, 14=LvS, 21=oL, 58=CE10 comm timeout). GS10 fault table != GS1. Global vfd_fault_code.
name: vfd_fault_code

documentation: GS10 active warning code (0x2100 high byte; warn IDs != fault IDs, e.g. CE10 warn=5 / fault=58). Global vfd_warn_code (V1.9).
name: vfd_warn_code

documentation: GS10 commanded frequency, raw Hz x100 (divide by 100). Sourced from vfd_freq_sp = the value the PLC writes to drive 0x2001 (NOT the 0x2102 keypad echo). Global vfd_freq_cmd (V1.9).
name: vfd_freq_cmd

documentation: GS10 output torque, raw % x10 (divide by 10). Needs GS10 motor nameplate params set or reads 0. Global vfd_torque (V1.9).
name: vfd_torque

documentation: GS10 motor speed, raw rpm. Needs GS10 motor rated-rpm/poles set or reads 0. Global vfd_motor_rpm (V1.9).
name: vfd_motor_rpm

documentation: GS10 output power, raw kW x1000 (divide by 1000). Needs GS10 motor nameplate params set or reads 0. Global vfd_power (V1.9).
name: vfd_power

documentation: PLC-latched last nonzero fault code (survives a drive fault reset; cleared only by coil last_fault_clear). GS10 fault table. Global vfd_last_fault (V1.9).
name: vfd_last_fault
